contracts.note: Derived from SGX's standard rule (3rd-Wednesday IMM convention, mod-following on SGX ∪ base/quote RTGS). For products where a leg currency is not bundled (e.g. INR, KRW), the BD-counting falls back to whichever calendars are present. Verify against the official contract specs page before trading.
